name: Xun Shao
page_title: Xun Shao 荀紹 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Son of Xun Yan, served in the Wei government.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	荀紹


	 Pronunciation 
	Xun2 Shao4


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Xún Shào


	 Wade-Giles 
	Hsün Shao

	 Birthplace 
	Yingyin county, Yingchuan commandery
sections.biography-source-undefined:
Xun Shao was from Yingyin county, Yingchuan commandery. He was the son of Xun Yan and the father of Xun Rong. The highest rank he had was Minister Chamberlain.

According to a stele presumed to belong to him, throughout his life, he once served as Chancellor of Qi, Grand Administrator of Shiping, Chief Clerk under the Grand General, and enfeoffed as District Marquis of Xiyang (西陽亭侯), and that he died on 2 August 244 at the age of fifty.

《金石録》曰：右魏太僕荀君碑其額題，魏故太僕西陽亭成侯荀府君之碑，碑已殘缺，其可見者，嘗為齊相、始平太守、大將軍長史，封西陽亭侯，遂為太僕。春秋五十有一，正始五年夏六月丙寅，薨。惟其名字鄉裡磨滅，不可考矣。

full_text:
Xun Shao 荀紹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Shao (荀紹)was born in Yingyin county, Yingchuan commandery. Son of Xun Yan, served in the Wei government. Xun Shao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xun Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
